case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. BLANCA E. ALEMAN MENA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 SERVED AUG-19-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MENA, BLANCA E. ALEMAN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-26-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BLANCA E. ALEMAN MENA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CURTIS E. A. KARNOW; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENA, BLANCA E. ALEMAN $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MENA, BLANCA E. ALEMAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MENA, BLANCA E. ALEMAN
